description: Style Noteglobal desi is the latest in Indian ethnic fusion wear for the international fashionista who loves an Indian twist in her ensemble. Fresh off the brand's design studio, wear this uniquely designed Indian top with colourful accessories. Check out myntra's collection of ethnic sandals that could go with this lovely Global Desi piece! Style it with fitted denims and chunky bangles.Product DetailsPink round neck sleeveless printed top, has a slit neckline and flaring pintucks below the bustMaterial and Care100% cottonDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
